name: Beef Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion in butter until transparent. Remove from pan.
2. Brown meat in the same pan.
3. Return onions to the pan.
4. Stir in 2 tablespoons flour.
5. Add mushrooms, ketchup, paprika, and sour cream.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Stir well.
8. Turn off heat and cook until the meat is tender.
9. Serve over cooked rice or noodles. If the beef mixture seems too thick, add a little milk to reach the desired consistency.
